key_themes: bexmarilimab clinical advancement in MDS and solid tumors
new partnerships and Phase II investigator-initiated trials (City of Hope, Parexel, MEDSIR)
upcoming data presentations (BSH 2026) and pipeline momentum
post-rights-issue dilution and near-term share price pressure
summary: Faron Pharmaceuticals (FARN.L), a clinical-stage biotech, is showing strong positive momentum on its lead asset bexmarilimab with multiple new 2026 trial collaborations, including a Phase IIb study with Parexel in higher-risk MDS (starting H2 2026) and expansions into sarcoma and relapsed/refractory MDS with City of Hope and others. Recent data acceptances for the BSH conference and the completed €40M capital raise support long-term optimism, with analyst price targets well above the current ~43p level. Short-term sentiment is tempered by dilution from the rights offering, low trading volume, and a depressed share price near 52-week lows, but the news flow is clearly constructive for pipeline-focused investors.
sources: 10+ web/RNS news items (Yahoo Finance, Investing.com, company releases, Proactive), Multiple LSE RNS filings (holdings, new share registrations, AGM notice), X searches (very low relevant volume in 2026; <5 directly stock-related posts found)
